# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #

set(_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR
  "${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/amdgpu_isa_xml-src"
)
loom_low_descriptor_data_archive(
  NAME
    loom_amdgpu_isa_xml
  SOURCE_DIR
    "${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}"
  URLS
    "https://gpuopen.com/download/AMD_GPU_MR_ISA_XML_2026_03_05.zip"
  SHA256
    "1f17587abc9d0d355cf6f65bdba7496838b4e8313922769199689615c434965c"
)

iree_add_all_subdirs()

  NAME
    target_info_defs
  HDRS
    "target_info_defs.h"
  DEPS
    iree::base
  PUBLIC
)

loom_target_table_cc_library(
  NAME
    target_info
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::amdgpu_target_info
  ARGS
    "--isa-xml=rdna3:${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}/amdgpu_isa_rdna3.xml"
    "--isa-xml=rdna4:${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}/amdgpu_isa_rdna4.xml"
    "--isa-xml=cdna4:${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}/amdgpu_isa_cdna4.xml"
  INPUTS
    "${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}/amdgpu_isa_cdna4.xml"
    "loom_amdgpu_isa_xml"
    "${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}/amdgpu_isa_rdna3.xml"
    "${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}/amdgpu_isa_rdna4.xml"
  DEPS
    ::target_info_defs
    iree::base
)

  NAME
    amdgpu_hal_testdata
  SRCS
    "execution/testdata/b128_vector_add.loom"
    "execution/testdata/divergent_if_else_store.loom"
    "execution/testdata/divergent_lds_producer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/divergent_then_store.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_bf16_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_bf16_gemm4x8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_gemm4x8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_lds_coop_gemm4x4x8.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_lds_gemm4x8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_lds_gemm4x8x8.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot4i_signed_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot4i_u8u8_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot4i_u8u8_gemm4x8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot4i_u8u8_tile8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot8i4_signed_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot8i4_u4u4_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot8i4_u4u4_lds_coop_gemm4x4x32.loom"
    "execution/testdata/gfx11_d16_lds_roundtrip.loom"
    "execution/testdata/gfx11_wmma_lds_roundtrip.loom"
    "execution/testdata/gfx11_wmma_zero.loom"
    "execution/testdata/lds_b128_roundtrip.loom"
  C_FILE_OUTPUT
    "execution/amdgpu_hal_testdata.c"
  H_FILE_OUTPUT
    "execution/amdgpu_hal_testdata.h"
  IDENTIFIER
    "loom_amdgpu_amdgpu_hal_testdata"
  TESTONLY
  FLATTEN
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    wait_plan
  HDRS
    "wait_plan.h"
  SRCS
    "wait_plan.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::function
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::schedule
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    wait_packets
  HDRS
    "wait_packets.h"
  SRCS
    "wait_packets.c"
  DEPS
    ::descriptor_ids
    ::wait_plan
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::function
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::amdgpu::target_info
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    occupancy
  HDRS
    "occupancy.h"
  SRCS
    "occupancy.c"
  DEPS
    ::gfx11_descriptors_ids
    ::gfx1250_descriptors_ids
    ::gfx12_descriptors_ids
    ::gfx950_descriptors_ids
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::allocation
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::diagnostics
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::schedule
    loom::src::loom::error::error_defs
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::target::types
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

loom_low_descriptor_exclude_from_all(
  CC_LIBRARIES
    "low_registry"
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    matrix_contract
  HDRS
    "matrix_contract.h"
  SRCS
    "matrix_contract.c"
  DEPS
    ::descriptor_ids
    ::target_info
    ::target_info_defs
    iree::base
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    matrix_contract_projection
  HDRS
    "matrix_contract_projection.h"
  SRCS
    "matrix_contract_projection.c"
  DEPS
    ::matrix_contract
    loom::src::loom::analysis::contract
    loom::src::loom::analysis::contract_storage
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    matrix_contract_test
  SRCS
    "matrix_contract_test.cc"
  DEPS
    ::descriptor_ids
    ::matrix_contract
    iree::testing::gtest
    iree::testing::gtest_main
)

loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    matrix_contract_projection_test
  SRCS
    "matrix_contract_projection_test.cc"
  DEPS
    ::matrix_contract
    ::matrix_contract_projection
    loom::src::loom::analysis::contract_storage
    iree::testing::gtest
    iree::testing::gtest_main
)
